title: Draft Optimized Portfolio - Ticker and Allocation Definition
outcome: Removed underperforming/negative Sharpe tickers (IIPR, FR, STAG, TRNO) from the industrial REITs segment. New candidates selected for lower beta/diversification and improved alpha: ABBV, JXI, SYBT, PLX, MDGL, VERO, FENG, ATNF, WAY, and MAT. Initial allocations: 50% re-allocated among retained tickers (pro-rata), 50% spread across new candidates to match risk/return contribution. Allocation fine-tuning, risk-validation, and further analytics to follow. Portfolio_dict format used for tracking next step.

title: Optimized Portfolio Allocation Recorded
outcome: Optimized portfolio rebalances out IIPR, FR, STAG, and TRNO. Allocates to new tickers with sector and risk diversification: ABBV, JXI, SYBT, PLX, MDGL, VERO, FENG, ATNF, WAY, and MAT each added at 1.3%, with minor pro-rata uplift of existing positions. Portfolio_dict structure and supporting rationales defined for next analytics and review cycle.

title: Optimized Portfolio Finalized - Allocations and Change Log
outcome: New optimized portfolio finalized. Industrial REIT overweight (IIPR, STAG, FR, TRNO) removed due to persistent underperformance, negative Sharpe, or sectoral risk. Added: ABBV (biotech), JXI (global utilities ETF), SYBT (regional bank), PLX (biotech), MDGL (biotech), VERO (health equipment), WAY (health tech), MAT (consumer discretionary), FENG (comm services), ATNF (biotech), all at ~1.3% each. Pro-rata uplift to retained positions. Portfolio_dict and detailed rationales included in memory. Ready for final analytics and risk adjustment cycle.

title: Optimized Portfolio Change Log - Iterative Refinement Complete
outcome: Industrial REITs (IIPR, FR, STAG, TRNO) removed for poor risk-reward. Added: ABBV, JXI, SYBT, PLX, MDGL, VERO, WAY, ATNF, FENG, MAT (each ~1.3%). Pro-rata marginal uplifts absorbed across risk/return diversified retained positions. Portfolio analytics validated improved Sharpe, lower average correlation, better stress resilience. Outlier risk in speculative names small, flag future VERO reduction if tail risks materialize. No further active changes required at this optimization pass.
